questions.question: Evaluate $i^{47}$.
questions.explanation: Powers of $i$ repeat every 4 terms. $47 = 4(11) + 3$, so $i^{47} = i^3 = i^2 \cdot i = -i$.

questions.question: If $z = 2 - 3i$, what is $z + \overline{z}$?
questions.explanation: The conjugate is $\overline{z} = 2 + 3i$. Adding: $(2 - 3i) + (2 + 3i) = 4$. (Real part doubles; imaginary parts cancel.)

questions.question: Simplify: $\frac{5}{2 + i}$. Write your answer in the form $a + bi$.
questions.explanation: Multiply by the conjugate: $\frac{5}{2+i} \cdot \frac{2-i}{2-i} = \frac{5(2-i)}{4 - i^2} = \frac{10 - 5i}{5} = 2 - i$.

questions.question: A complex number $w$ satisfies $w^2 = -9$. Find all possible values of $w$.
